description_long: This object is a modern desktop computer tower, featuring a rectangular, upright chassis with a transparent front panel that reveals three large RGB-lit cooling fans. The side panels are opaque and likely made of metal or tinted glass, while the rear panel displays a standard arrangement of I/O ports, expansion slots, and a rear exhaust fan. The top and bottom surfaces are flat and solid, providing stability and a clean silhouette. The RGB fans emit a spectrum of colors, giving the device a visually striking appearance, especially in low-light environments. The overall design is sleek and minimalistic, with subtle detailing and a focus on functionality and cooling efficiency. This type of object is commonly found in offices, homes, or gaming setups, and is typically placed on or under desks.
description: A sleek desktop computer tower with a transparent front panel showcasing three RGB-lit fans and a minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing three prominent RGB-lit cooling fans behind a transparent panel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid, opaque panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing I/O ports, expansion slots, and a rear exhaust fan.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a partially visible interior and some internal components faintly seen through a tinted panel.
